meaning: adj.(奥地利遗传学家)孟德尔的,孟德尔法则的n.孟德尔学派的人
examples: Mendelian genetics in the setting of neuropsychiatry.
This is the web page of OMIM Online Mendelian Inheritance in Man.
The pedigree analysis was correct and proved in Mendelian inheritance.
Minushika set up an experiment to demonstrate principles of Mendelian inheritance in white clover.
At first, of course, the rediscovery of the Mendelian gene was thought to be the death knell for Darwinism.
